metadata.title: Process Systems and Machinery | Welltech®
metadata.description: International standard stainless steel agitated tanks, reactors, homogenizers, and CIP systems for the food, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries.

hero.title: Industrial Process Systems
hero.desc: High-precision and automated stainless steel process machinery at FDA and CE standards, forming the heart of your production line.

categories.title: Agitated Tanks
categories.desc: High-efficiency stainless mixer tanks with specially designed blade (agitator) structures for liquid-liquid and liquid-solid mixtures.

categories.title: Chemical Reactors
categories.desc: Heavy-duty systems that safely control chemical reactions occurring under high pressure, vacuum, and extreme temperature conditions.

categories.title: Homogenizers
categories.desc: High-speed mixers that ensure the production of smooth and stable products by breaking down fluids in different phases (emulsions) at the micron level.

categories.title: Mobile Units
categories.desc: Portable mixing and transfer units equipped with their own pumps and automation panels that can be easily transported to different stations within the facility.

categories.title: Heated/Cooled (Jacketed) Tanks
categories.desc: Systems with half-pipe coil, roll-bond, or double-wall technologies for processes where product temperature needs to be precisely controlled.

categories.title: Fermentation and Bioreactors
categories.desc: Sterile biotechnological reactors that allow bacteria, yeast, or cell cultures to multiply in an ideal temperature, oxygen, and pH environment.

categories.title: Fully Automatic CIP Systems
categories.desc: Sterilization units that allow automatic washing and disinfection of production lines, tanks, and pumps without dismantling (Clean-in-Place).

cta.title: Process-Specific Engineering
cta.desc: Share your production recipe and targeted capacity with our expert engineers, and let us design the most suitable system for your process with 3D simulations.
